title: AccidentCase entity (ONT-E-16)
description: A documented accident or incident case (NTSB, AAIB, BEA, CAAC, ICAO ADREP). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref. phase_of_flight enum aligns with the applicable_during_phase relation (D-08, ADR-003). The lessons_learned field is the audit-relevant takeaway and is required. Pitfall #1 lock: unevaluatedProperties: false. Pitfall #9 lock: $schema = JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Locked to 'AccidentCase' for this entity type.

date.description: ISO 8601 date of the accident / incident occurrence.

location.description: Geographic location free-text (e.g. 'KSFO Runway 28L', 'En-route 200 nm SW of YBBN'). Coordinates not required at v0.1.0.

aircraft_model_ref.description: Optional URI of the AircraftModel involved. Sometimes unknown / not yet identified at incident-recording time.

phase_of_flight.description: Flight phase when the event occurred. Aligns with the applicable_during_phase relation enum (D-08, ADR-003). 'ground' covers events while parked / in maintenance bay; 'unknown' is permitted for incomplete reports.

causal_factors.description: Required ≥1 free-text causal factor. Maps to NTSB/ICAO 'cause' findings.

contributing_factors.description: Optional free-text contributing factors (distinct from primary causal factors).

lessons_learned.description: Audit-relevant takeaway (≥20 chars). The 'why this case matters' summary that answers 'what should designers / operators do differently'. Empty / placeholder strings fail validation by design.

official_report_url.description: Optional URI to the official accident report (NTSB docket, AAIB final report, BEA report, ICAO ADREP).
